summary: Live production proof completed for both Phase 11 cases; checkpoint objective is satisfied even though the image-bearing user problem remains open.

checks.detail: Live run artifacts exist for FE Credit and Ngu Hoa cases, plus a phase verdict and improvement packet.
Planner resilience metadata is present in production for both cases and FE Credit reached ANSWER_READY.
Image-bearing case failed with STEP_STUCK_TIMEOUT but emitted timeout salvage with collected_count=54, persisted_count=0, and image_candidate_count=53.

issues: Phase 11 passes as a delivery checkpoint, but it does not fully solve image-bearing evidence acquisition in production.
No production record in Phase 11 triggered image understanding or produced persisted visual-evidence candidates.
